resources.string: Running / waiting / total session counts at a glance.
CPU load, memory and session counts from the active datawatch server.
No sessions yet. Use `new: <task>` from a messaging backend to start one, or wait for the daemon to push one here.
These sessions will be removed from the server. This cannot be undone.
Warm-resume this session on the server. Any in-progress prompt may be interrupted.
Signal the server to terminate this running session. Unsaved in-flight work may be lost.
The session history will be removed from the server. This cannot be undone.
No process stats — eBPF may not be active for this session.
Session is waiting on a reply.
No messages yet. Waiting for session output…
No events yet — open a session that has produced output to see state transitions, prompts, and completions here.
Server unreachable — terminal stream paused, last frame shown.
This stops the tmux session on the server. The session cannot be resumed (a new session would need to be started).
This removes the session record from the server. Tracking data on disk is preserved. This cannot be undone.
e.g. refactor payments module to use new auth
No servers configured — add one in Settings first.
No sessions need input. You\'re caught up.
No templates. Tap + to create one.
Permanently removes \"%1$s\" and all child PRDs. This cannot be undone.
No per-process network data — eBPF taps not active.
eBPF configured but probes not active. Check server logs or run: datawatch setup ebpf
Select a session from the list
eBPF support is built into the daemon but probes aren\'t loaded. Run `datawatch setup ebpf` to enable.
Require fingerprint or face on every app open. Database key is biometric-bound when enabled.
Unavailable — no Class-3 biometric enrolled on this device.
Scan with Signal on another device
No active automata. Launch one with ⚡.
Delete this template? This cannot be undone.
What do you want to accomplish?
e.g. Add a CACHE column to /api/stats… or Research LLM evaluation frameworks…
Send a message to begin the conversation
Memory commands work here: remember, recall, kg, research
No triples found for this entity.
Describe the coding task for the AI to work on.
e.g. Add unit tests to internal/session/manager.go (leave empty for an interactive shell session)
Save this automaton as a reusable template
Hard-delete the PRD and any descendants
Send the PRD back for revision with a note
Up to 50 paths. Empty lines + leading/trailing whitespace get stripped.
Spec — describe the feature in plain English
Static analysis (SAST, secrets, dependencies, LLM grader) over the PRD spec and any associated files. Runs the configured scanners and reports a verdict and findings.
Run all configured scanners against this PRD
Tasks without a per-task override inherit these values. Empty = fall back to the global session.llm_backend default.
Empty = inherit the PRD\'s default execution profile (PRD.project_profile). A name overrides for this story only.
Guided mode — pause for operator after each story for review
Skill IDs from /api/skills passed to every task session.
Type, backend, effort, model, skills, guided mode
Per-task LLM override — empty inherits PRD then global.
Examples: in 30m, at 14:00, tomorrow at 9am, next monday at 10:00
e.g. Fix the auth bug in login.go
Required — enter prompt for this backend
Unable to connect to session terminal
Daemon restarting — reconnect will happen automatically.
Secrets and API keys are kept on the server.
0 = use backend default (80×24, or 120×40 for claude-code)
No results. Try a different query.
This automaton has reached a terminal state. Create a new run to continue.
%d legacy LLM config(s) auto-migrated. Review entries below.
Stale — last seen over 6 hours ago
What is this persona\'s primary area of focus?
How does this persona approach problems?
How would you describe this persona\'s communication style?
What does this persona push back against?
Provide 2-3 example responses this persona might give.
Review and tune the assembled persona prompt
No rules — tasks route to the default backend
